# task_detail

> Jinja2 template rendering individual task detail pages in Watchtower. Shows task frontmatter, acceptance criteria with checkboxes, verification commands, decisions, and update history with markdown rendering.

**Type:** template | **Subsystem:** watchtower | **Location:** `web/templates/task_detail.html`
